notes: 修复 Claude 账号刷新反复卡在「限流中」、隔一阵就得重新登录的问题。根因是刷新 token 用的 User-Agent 恰好落在服务端按 UA 拦截的那一类,自动刷新持续 429、access token 过期后只能重登;现改用真实 Claude Code CLI 的 UA 越过这道拦截(usage 拉取的 UA 不变)。另新增「续期名额轮转」:同一批账号的 token 续期时刻自动错开、每轮只放行一个续期,避免同批到期时挤成一次突发把限流打上;token 到期但本轮没轮到名额的账号会中性地显示「待续期」并继续展示上次数据,无需你操作。
notes_en: Fixes Claude accounts getting stuck on "rate limited" and needing repeated re-logins. Root cause: the User-Agent used for token refresh happened to fall into the bucket the server filters by UA — refreshes kept getting 429'd, so once the access token expired the only way out was logging in again. Refresh now uses the real Claude Code CLI User-Agent to get past that filter (the usage-fetch UA is unchanged). Also adds renewal-slot rotation: token renewals for a batch of accounts are spread out with only one renewal allowed per round, so a batch expiring together no longer bursts into the rate limit. An account whose token has expired but didn't get this round's slot simply shows a neutral "awaiting renewal" with its last data — no action needed.
